title: Aether + Addons - Farmer's Delight - Bark Cutting Compat
description: Adds Compatibility Between The Aether + Addons & Farmer's Delight
body:
Adds Support Between [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) + Addons & [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) (addons down below)

[CurseForge Version Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/aether-addons-farmers-delight-bark-cutting-compat)

Normally, when you try to cut modded wood types with a cutting board, a message appears saying, 'Doesn't seem cuttable...' However, with this datapack, it simply cuts the wood and gives you bark!

Both Mods Are Required! (Addons are not required)

Addons:

- [The Aether: Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aether-redux)

- [Deep Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether)

- [Ancient Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-aether)

Types:

- Blightwillow,

- Cloudcap Hyphae & Stem,

- Conberry,

- Cruderoot,

- Crystal,

- Fieldspoot,

- Glacia,

- Highsproot,

- Roseroot,

- Sakura,

- Skyroot,

- Sunroot,

- Yagroot.

All Types have,

- Door,

- Hanging Sign,

- Log,

- Sign,

- Trapdoor,

- And Wood Types!

# THIS IS A DATAPACK!

How to Download:

1. Download the file.

2. Add it to the datapacks folder or use a loader (links below).

3. Start your world.

Links:

- [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi)

- [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader)

- [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)
